name: Artifact
tagline: AI-powered personalized news aggregator by Instagram co-founders
description: Built by Instagram co-founders Kevin Systrom and Mike Krieger, Artifact was an AI news app that shut down after failing to find a large enough market.
story: Artifact launched in January 2023 with enormous buzz — it was the first startup from Instagram co-founders Kevin Systrom and Mike Krieger since leaving Meta. Billed as 'TikTok for text,' the app used AI to curate personalized news feeds and let users discuss articles. Despite the founders' pedigree, Artifact struggled to grow its user base beyond the U.S. and downloads dropped steeply after the initial launch period. The app suffered an identity crisis, cycling through features that made it feel like Twitter, then Pinterest, then a news reader, without settling on a clear identity. In January 2024, Systrom announced the shutdown, candidly admitting that 'the market opportunity isn't big enough to warrant continued investment.' The founders later kept a minimal version running with just two people.

sources.title: Instagram co-founders' Artifact to shut down
